title: Phonetic and semantic analyses of spoken corpora of Beijing and Taiwan Mandarin indicate that the neutral tone is a lexical tone
abstract: arXiv:2606.26360v1 Announce Type: new  Abstract: The neutral, or floating, tone of Mandarin Chinese is a tone with an enigmatic set of properties. It has been described as a reduced tone, or as a tone that sometimes is lexically fixed but that can also be toneless. In two-syllable words, it is found only on the second syllable, but single-syllable words can also have the neutral tone. We present a corpus-based study of the phonetic realization of the neutral tone in spontaneous conversational speech corpora of Beijing Mandarin and Taiwan Mandarin. We show that the neutral tone has its own tonal target, just as the four lexical tones of Mandarin. We also show that disyllabic words with a neutral tone have pitch contours that have a pitch component that depends on the tone on the first syllable, just as has been observed for two-syllable words with a lexical tone on the second syllable (Chuang et al., 2026). Furthermore, words with a floating tone have word-specific pitch signatures, whi

translated_title: 北京与台湾口语语料库的音系与语义分析表明：轻声是一种词汇声调
translated_abstract: 摘要：汉语的轻声（或称浮动声调）是一组特性令人费解的声调。它曾被描述为一种弱化声调，或是一种有时在词汇上固定、但也可以无调性的声调。在双音节词中，轻声只出现在第二个音节上，但单音节词也可能带有轻声。我们基于北京话和台湾话自发性对话语料库，对轻声的语音实现进行了语料库研究。研究表明，轻声与汉语的四个词汇声调一样，拥有自身的声调目标。我们还发现，带有轻声的双音节词，其音高轮廓包含一个取决于首音节声调的音高成分，这与第二个音节为词汇声调的双音节词（Chuang 等人，2026）观察到的现象一致。此外，带有浮动声调的词具有词特定的音高特征，这些特征...
tldr: 本研究通过语料库分析证明，汉语轻声具有与四个词汇声调相同的独立声调目标，且双音节词中轻声的音高轮廓受首音节声调影响，表明轻声本质上是一种词汇声调。
en_tdlr: This corpus-based study demonstrates that the Mandarin neutral tone has its own tonal target comparable to the four lexical tones, and its pitch contour in disyllabic words is influenced by the first syllable's tone, indicating that the neutral tone is fundamentally a lexical tone.
